  • Index
  • Search
  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AbilityBlockBreakEvent
    Fired before an ability breaks multiple blocks (e.g., Tree Capitator, Hammer).
    AbilityListener
    Main listener for handling ability activations.
    AbilityLoreGenerator
     
    AbilityLoreListener
     
    AbilityManager
     
    AbilityStat
    Generic MMOItems stat wrapper for SkyBlock abilities.
    AnvilCommand
    Command to open the Custom Anvil GUI.
    AnvilRegistry
    A classloader-safe registry for custom anvil logic.
    ArrowEffectsAbility
     
    AuraSkillsHook
    Hook for AuraSkills integration.
    AuraSkillsListener
    Listener for AuraSkills events.
    BaseGUI
    Common interface for all plugin GUIs to ensure consistent event handling.
    BlacksmithCommand
    Command handler for /blacksmith.
    BlockPlaceListener
    Listener to track player-placed blocks to prevent exploits with farming enchantments.
    BoomerangAbility
     
    ButchersBladeAbility
     
    CharcoalConverterAbility
     
    ChatInputManager
    Manages chat input for GUI interactions.
    CleanseAbility
     
    ColorUtils
    Utility for handling HEX colors and legacy color codes.
    ColorUtils
     
    ConfigManager
    Manages all configuration files for the plugin.
    ConflictSelectionGUI
    GUI for selecting conflicting enchantments.
    CooldownLoreTask
     
    CooldownManager
    Manages ability cooldowns for players.
    CropOverdriveAbility
     
    CustomAnvilGUI
    Hypixel SkyBlock-style Anvil GUI based on user's diagram.
    CustomEnchant
    Represents a custom enchantment created through MMOEnchants.
    CustomEnchant.EnchantStat
    Available stat types for custom enchantments
    CustomEnchantListener
    Listener for custom enchantment effects and GUI interactions.
    CustomEnchantManager
    Manages custom enchantments created through MMOEnchants.
    DashAbility
     
    DisableAnvilStat
     
    DisableEnchantingStat
     
    DogWhistleAbility
     
    DoubleJumpAbility
     
    DurabilityListener
    Global listener to prevent items from losing durability.
    EarthquakeAbility
     
    EnchantCommand
    Command to open the Enchanting GUI.
    EnchantEditorGUI
    GUI for editing a custom enchantment.
    EnchantingGUI
    The main enchanting GUI - based on the old plugin's GUI but improved and recoded.
    EnchantListGUI
    GUI for listing all custom enchantments.
    EnchantManager
    Manages enchantment definitions loaded from enchants.yml.
    EnchantManager.EnchantConfig
     
    EnchantManager.LevelConfig
     
    EnchantmentGuideGUI
    A comprehensive guide for all enchantments in the plugin.
    EnchantsCommand
    Admin command to manage custom enchants.
    ExplosiveArrowAbility
     
    FarmersAuraAbility
     
    FlightSkillAbility
     
    GenericAbility
     
    GlowStat
     
    GoldenLeafAbility
     
    GrapplingHookAbility
    Grappling Hook ability - Fishing Rod edition.
    GuiListener
    Listener for GUI events and vanilla block interaction overrides.
    HammerAbility
     
    HawkEyeAbility
     
    HealBeamAbility
     
    InfiniteReservoirListener
    Listener for Infinite Reservoir ability - prevents water bucket from emptying.
    InfiniteReservoirStat
     
    LaserAbility
     
    LevelSelectionGUI
    Sub-menu for selecting enchantment level.
    LightningArrowAbility
     
    LoreFixListener
     
    LuckyTreasureAbility
     
    MagnetAbility
     
    MessageUtils
     
    MessageUtils.MessageType
     
    MetabolismAbility
     
    MinersLuckAbility
     
    MMOItemsAbilityListener
    Global combat protection listener.
    MMOItemsHook
    Hook for MMOItems integration.
    MMOItemsHook
     
    MMOItemsStatIntegration
    Helper class for integrating reforge stats with MMOItems' native stat system.
    NaturalAbilityLoreStat
    A generic MMOItems stat that injects configurable lore for ALL abilities on the item.
    NightVisionCharmAbility
     
    NightVisionStat
     
    OverloadAbility
     
    OxygenPurityAbility
     
    PaperPickBlockListener
    Paper-only: creative middle-click pick block + deferred rarity.
    PassiveAbilityTask
    Task that runs every second to handle passive abilities.
    PoisonAbility
     
    Rarity
    Represents a single item rarity.
    RarityCommand
    Command handler for /rarity commands.
    RarityListener
    Event-driven rarity: RarityTask, Paper pick-block, coalesced defer in RarityManager.
    RarityManager
    Manages the ItemRarity system - loading, applying, and removing rarities from items.
    RarityStat
    Custom MMOItems stat for item rarity.
    RarityTask
    Backup task that periodically scans player inventories for items without rarity.
    Reforge
    Represents a single reforge configuration.
    Reforge.RarityData
    Represents data specific to a rarity tier.
    ReforgeAbilitySelectorGUI
    DEPRECATED - This GUI is no longer used and is kept as a stub to avoid compilation errors if any other (non-reforge) logic still references the class name.
    ReforgeableStat
    Custom MMOItems stat that determines whether an item can be reforged.
    ReforgeApplier
    Handles the application and removal of reforges from items.
    ReforgeCommand
    Command handler for /reforge.
    ReforgeEditorGUI
    GUI for editing individual reforge properties.
    ReforgeEnchantSelectorGUI
    GUI for selecting vanilla and custom enchantments for a reforge.
    ReforgeGem
    Represents a special gem required for certain reforges.
    ReforgeGemEditorGUI
    GUI for editing individual Gem properties.
    ReforgeGUI
    GUI for the reforge system.
    ReforgeItemTypeSelectorGUI
    GUI for selecting item types for reforges (based on TargetSelectorGUI pattern).
    ReforgeListener
    Event listener for the reforge GUI.
    ReforgeListGUI
    GUI for listing all custom reforges with create/edit/delete capabilities.
    ReforgeManager
    Manages the reforge system - loading reforges from configuration, providing access to reforges, and handling reforge application logic.
    ReforgesCommand
    Admin command to manage reforges.
    ReforgeStatEditorGUI
    GUI for editing individual stats of a reforge.
    ReforgeStatSelectorGUI
    GUI for selecting MMOItems stats to add to a reforge.
    ReforgeVIPGUI
    VIP Reforge GUI with two input slots (Item + Gem).
    RetaliationAbility
     
    SkyBlockAbility
     
    SkyBlockAnvilUpdateEvent
    Fired when the CustomAnvilGUI in SkyBlockItems updates its result.
    SkyBlockItems
    Main class for SkyBlockItems.
    SkyBlockItemsCommand
    Main command for the SkyBlockItems plugin (/sbi).
    SkyBlockRarityUpdateEvent
    Fired when an item is being processed for rarity application.
    SkyBlockReforgeEvent
    Fired when an item is about to be reforged (e.g. via Smithing Table or Anvil).
    SkySmashAbility
     
    SolarRepairAbility
     
    SolarStat
     
    SpeedAbility
    Speed ability - gives Speed 4 effect on right-click.
    StatApplier
    Handles intelligent stat application to items.
    StatEditorGUI
    GUI for editing enchantment stats.
    TargetSelectorGUI
    GUI for selecting target item types.
    TargetUtils
     
    ThunderStrikeAbility
     
    TreeCapitatorAbility
     
    TreeCapitatorEvent
    Custom event fired when a Tree Capitator ability is used to break multiple blocks.
    TriggerType
     
    UnderwaterAbility
     
    UnderwaterStat
     
    VaultHook
    Integration hook for Vault economy.
    WebSnareAbility
     
    WorldGuardHook
     
    WorldGuardUtils
    Utility class for WorldGuard integration.
    XPCostEditorGUI
    GUI for editing XP costs per level.
